channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Missing sign., 25th June
item.description:
This is a very important sign for local traffic. But seems to have completely disappeared. Can it be replaced asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8a, New Barn Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is missing (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 25th June
item.description:
FW abrupt level difference 400mm x 300mm x 35mm Give and take TM Outside number 22 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forgotten works, 25th June
item.description:
Several areas got dug to to resurface and all of them done except this one. There is an unfinished road ramp that has been there for days with no sign of work. Looks as though it was forgotten.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 25th June
item.description:
15DB Pothole CW 600mm x 300mm x 44mm Road Closure TM Narrow lane Stats Required Fill around ironwork (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 25th June
item.description:
Faded Giveway Markings CW Road Closure TM 29 x 200mm Double 12 x 200mm Single 1 x Centre (Faded Road Markings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Fallen tree branch on public footpath, 25th June
item.description:
Large branch from council-owned tree has fallen and causing obstruction on public footpath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Cottage Rake Avenue, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
